summary: Iteration 50 - Undo/Holiday Buttons in Onboarding Wizard and Global Holidays API Testing Complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Undo and Holiday buttons are ONLY in OnboardingWizard component, NOT in Daily Projection table.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingWizard.jsx: Lines 840-872 contain Undo button (data-testid='undo-missed-trade-btn') and Holiday button (data-testid='mark-holiday-btn') with TreePine icon
OnboardingWizard.jsx: Undo button appears when currentEntry?.missed or currentEntry?.holiday is true (replacing 'I Missed This Trade' button)
OnboardingWizard.jsx: Holiday badge shows with TreePine icon when day is marked as holiday (line 777)
ProfitTrackerPage.jsx: Daily Projection table does NOT have Undo/Holiday buttons - only has 'Adjust Trade' button for missed days
Backend: Global holidays endpoints at /api/admin/global-holidays work correctly for Master Admin (GET, POST, DELETE)
Backend: User holidays endpoints at /api/trade/holidays work correctly for personal holidays
seed_data_creation: Test global holidays created for dates 60-62 days in future, then removed during cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Undo/Holiday buttons are ONLY in OnboardingWizard (Step 5 - Enter Your Trade Profits). Daily Projection table in ProfitTrackerPage does NOT have these buttons - it only has 'Adjust Trade' button for missed days. Global holidays API endpoints work correctly for Master Admin.

feature_1_undo_button_in_onboarding.details: Undo button (data-testid='undo-missed-trade-btn') appears when a day is marked as missed, replacing 'I Missed This Trade' button

feature_2_holiday_button_in_onboarding.details: TreePine holiday icon button (data-testid='mark-holiday-btn') is visible and clickable for personal holidays

feature_3_holiday_badge_in_onboarding.details: Holiday badge with TreePine icon shows when day is marked as holiday

feature_4_daily_projection_no_actions.details: Daily Projection table does NOT have Undo/Holiday buttons - only has 'Adjust Trade' button for missed days

feature_5_global_holidays_get.details: Returns list of global holidays for admins

feature_6_global_holidays_post.details: Master Admin can add global holidays with date and reason

feature_7_global_holidays_delete.details: Master Admin can remove global holidays

api_tests.GET /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Returns list of global holidays
api_tests.POST /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Adds global holiday (Master Admin only)
api_tests.POST /api/admin/global-holidays (invalid: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid date format
api_tests.GET /api/trade/global-holidays: PASS - Any authenticated user can view global holidays

profit_tracker_page.adjust_trade_only: Lines 2296-2326: Only 'Adjust Trade' button for missed days
